calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB,
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant MAXIM TOCAREV AKA MAXIN I TOCAREV AKA MAXIM ITOCAREV, AN INDIVIDUAL,
Declaration of Robert J. Rebhan pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant MAXIM TOCAREV AKA MAXIN I TOCAREV AKA MAXIM ITOCAREV, AN INDIVIDUAL as follows:
Principal $6308.49
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $403.29
Total Judgment in the amount of $6711.78

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2016 Set For Trial On Mar-06-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Submission On Plaintiffs Motion To Deem Matters Admitted
Off Calendar Sep-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Submission On Plaintiffs Motion To Deem Matters Admitted is granted, no opposition. Sanctions awarded against Maxim Tocarev in the amount of $360, to be paid to Michael & Associates law firm within 20 days of service of this order. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
